What is in the Classic Milk Tea?
The Classic Milk Tea is made with Assam black tea, whole milk, chewy tapioca pearls (boba), cane sugar syrup, and ice. It's a traditional boba drink available in Regular ($5.50) or Large ($6.50).

Does the Matcha Zen contain caffeine?

Yes, the Matcha Zen has a high caffeine level. It uses ceremonial grade Japanese matcha powder, which is naturally high in caffeine. It also contains oat milk, honey boba pearls, honey, and ice. Prices are $6.75 for Regular and $7.75 for Large.

I'm vegan. What can I order at TeaZen?

Great news — several items can be made vegan! The Taro Bliss and Brown Sugar Tiger can both be ordered with oat milk or coconut milk instead of dairy. The Strawberry Cloud is vegan if you skip the cheese foam. For food, the Mochi Trio's red bean flavor is vegan, the Poké Bowl is vegan with tofu and no sriracha mayo, and the Summer Rolls are vegan with tofu — the peanut dipping sauce is vegan too. The Matcha Zen contains honey, but you can request agave syrup instead.

What allergens are in the Taiyaki?

The Taiyaki contains gluten (flour), dairy (milk and butter), and eggs. If you choose the Nutella filling, it also contains tree nuts. There is no vegan or gluten-free option currently available for Taiyaki, though the team is testing a red bean version without egg batter — ask the staff.

What sizes does the Brown Sugar Tiger come in and how much does each cost?
The Brown Sugar Tiger comes in two sizes: Regular for $6.25 and Large for $7.25.

Tell me about the Strawberry Cloud drink.

The Strawberry Cloud is a refreshing fruit tea made with fresh blended strawberries and jasmine green tea, topped with a sweet cheese foam. It has low caffeine and is available in Regular ($6.50) or Large ($7.50). The cheese foam is made from cream cheese, milk, sugar, and salt. Popular customizations include ordering it without cheese foam (which also makes it vegan), adding extra strawberry, or adding lychee jelly.

What is the cheapest drink on the menu?
The cheapest drink is the Classic Milk Tea at $5.50 for a Regular size.

What toppings or customizations can I add to my drink?

TeaZen offers several popular customizations depending on the drink. Options include: extra boba, lychee jelly, honey boba, less or more sugar (e.g. 50% sugar), oat milk or coconut milk substitutes, agave syrup instead of honey, extra matcha, and no ice. Ask the tea master about current available toppings and customization options.

Does the Poké Bowl have a vegetarian option?

Yes! The Poké Bowl can be made vegetarian or vegan by choosing tofu instead of ahi tuna. The bowl comes with sushi rice, avocado, edamame, cucumber, shredded carrots, sesame seeds, and green onion. For a fully vegan bowl, also request no sriracha mayo or ask for vegan mayo instead. It's priced at $12.95.

What is in the Brown Sugar Tiger?

The Brown Sugar Tiger is made with house-made brown sugar syrup (dark brown sugar, water, and ginger), fresh whole milk, chewy tapioca pearls, and ice. It contains no caffeine and is free of tea entirely. It contains dairy, but you can substitute oat milk. A warm version is also available on request.

How much is the Mochi Trio and what flavors does it come in?

The Mochi Trio is $5.00 for 3 pieces. The flavors rotate seasonally — examples include red bean paste, matcha cream, and strawberry cream. The red bean flavor is vegan. Ask the staff for the current flavors available today.

What does the Summer Rolls come with?

The Summer Rolls (2 pieces for $7.50) are made with rice paper wrappers, your choice of shrimp or tofu, rice vermicelli noodles, butter lettuce, fresh mint, cilantro, bean sprouts, and shredded carrots. They come with a peanut hoisin dipping sauce made with hoisin, peanut butter, lime, and garlic. Note: the dipping sauce contains peanuts and gluten (hoisin sauce).

I have a peanut allergy. What should I avoid?

If you have a peanut allergy, you should avoid the Summer Rolls — the dipping sauce contains peanut butter. Please also let the staff know about your allergy when ordering so they can take precautions to avoid cross-contamination.

What is the Bubble Club?
The Bubble Club is TeaZen's loyalty program. Members receive a 10% discount on every drink they purchase. To join, just ask the tea master in-store for details.

Do you have any dairy-free drinks?

Yes! The Strawberry Cloud is dairy-free as long as you order it without the cheese foam. The Matcha Zen uses oat milk by default. The Taro Bliss, Classic Milk Tea, and Brown Sugar Tiger all use dairy milk by default, but you can request oat milk or coconut milk as a substitute for any of them.

What food items do you serve at TeaZen?

TeaZen serves four food items: the Mochi Trio (3 seasonal mochi pieces for $5.00), Taiyaki (fish-shaped waffle pastry with your choice of red bean, Nutella, or custard filling — $3.50 for 1 or $9.00 for 3), a Poké Bowl with tuna or tofu ($12.95), and Summer Rolls with shrimp or tofu ($7.50 for 2 pieces).

What is in the cheese foam on the Strawberry Cloud?
The cheese foam on the Strawberry Cloud is made from cream cheese, milk, sugar, and salt. It contains dairy. If you want to skip it, just ask — without the foam it becomes a vegan-friendly drink.

Is the Taro Bliss caffeinated?
The Taro Bliss has a very low caffeine level. It's made with taro root powder rather than brewed tea, so it contains minimal to no caffeine — making it a good choice for those sensitive to caffeine.

What merch does TeaZen sell?

TeaZen sells two merchandise items: the TeaZen Zen Vibes Tee, a 100% organic cotton t-shirt available in S, M, L, and XL for $18.95, and the TeaZen Boba Tumbler, a 20oz tumbler with a wide boba straw for $14.95. Both come with a perk — wear the shirt or bring the tumbler in-store and get 10% off your drink!

Can I get a warm drink at TeaZen?
Yes! The Brown Sugar Tiger is available warm on request. Ask the tea master — other drinks may be available warm as well depending on the day.

What is the most expensive item on the menu?
The most expensive food item is the Poké Bowl at $12.95. Among drinks, the Matcha Zen Large is $7.75 and the Taro Bliss Large is $7.00. Among merch, the TeaZen Zen Vibes Tee is $18.95.

What makes the Matcha Zen special compared to other matcha drinks?

The Matcha Zen uses ceremonial grade Japanese matcha, which is a higher quality matcha than food-grade powder used in most cafes. It's whisked to perfection with oat milk (already dairy-free by default) and topped with honey boba pearls — boba pearls sweetened with honey rather than plain sugar syrup, which gives them a distinct floral sweetness.

I'm gluten intolerant. What can I safely order?

Most of the drinks at TeaZen are gluten-free, including the Taro Bliss, Matcha Zen, Strawberry Cloud, and Brown Sugar Tiger. The Classic Milk Tea's tapioca pearls may contain trace gluten — ask the staff. For food, the Poké Bowl and Summer Rolls contain gluten (soy sauce and hoisin sauce). The Mochi Trio uses glutinous rice flour which is naturally gluten-free, but confirm with staff about cross-contamination. Always let the team know about your intolerance so they can advise accordingly.

What protein options are available for the Poké Bowl?
The Poké Bowl comes with your choice of ahi tuna (marinated in soy sauce, sesame oil, and ginger) or firm tofu (marinated in soy and sesame). The tofu option is vegetarian and vegan-friendly.

How many pieces come in the Summer Rolls and what do they cost?
The Summer Rolls come as 2 pieces for $7.50. They're made with rice paper, your choice of shrimp or tofu, rice noodles, fresh herbs, and vegetables, served with a peanut hoisin dipping sauce.
